JUDGE DONNA J. HITCHENS, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER PAT VAN STEENBERGE. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF APR-08-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-08-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 306, KEVIN MCCARTHY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT. SENT FOR PROVE-UP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 515 JONES STREET, #14, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $5,728.35 RENT, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,832.35, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
COURT TRIAL ON APR-08-2002 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF, SURESH CHHIPWADIA AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT, DAID WILLIAMS.
